name: Improve solver3 construction relative broad-suite score

description: Baseline for softened relative broad-suite construction metric
Repeat baseline measurement for relative metric noise calibration
Increase outside-region move penalty under relative metric
Tried stronger selected-region move bonus with outside penalty; worsened relative score despite better 169x13 constrained

asi.hypothesis: Increasing the within-selected-region move bonus might preserve selected-template basin locality while the existing outside-region penalty prevents disruptive pulls.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary broad_relative_score regressed versus current best; the improvement on score_sgp_169x13x14_constrained was outweighed by worse Sailing, large immovable, clique, 49x7 constrained, and a zero-regression penalty.
asi.next_action_hint: Do not simply increase selected-region move bonus globally. Prefer more targeted merge scoring that reduces outside pulls without over-prioritizing any selected-region move.

description: Tried lower scaffold-disruption weight under relative metric; near best but still worse and adds zero-regression

asi.hypothesis: Under the relative metric, a lower scaffold-disruption penalty may let the oracle improve large cases such as Sailing enough to beat the old log-optimized 3x setting.
asi.rollback_reason: The relative mean improved, but one zero-baseline regression penalty made the primary metric slightly worse than current best; several constrained SGP sentinels also regressed.
asi.next_action_hint: A more selective zero-regression guard or template choice may be needed; avoid globally lowering disruption weight without protecting zero-baseline solved cases.

description: Tried 2.5x scaffold-disruption weight under relative metric; regressed broadly

asi.hypothesis: A moderate scaffold-disruption weight may capture part of the 2x large-case benefit while avoiding the zero-regression/balance issues.
asi.rollback_reason: 2.5x did not preserve the 2x benefits and regressed the relative mean plus zero-regression guard; Sailing, large immovable, Google CP, and constrained SGP signals worsened.
asi.next_action_hint: Do not tune disruption weight further in this simple scalar form unless paired with a principled zero-regression or candidate-risk mechanism.

description: Tried stronger current-group keep bonus with outside penalty; regressed relative score

asi.hypothesis: A stronger bonus for keeping a person in its scaffold group when that group is also the oracle target could preserve basins while still accepting clear oracle-aligned placements.
asi.rollback_reason: The primary relative metric worsened; zero-regression penalty appeared and large immovable / synthetic / 49x7 constrained sentinels regressed despite some constrained 169x13 improvement.
asi.next_action_hint: Do not globally raise keep_bonus. If preserving current groups is needed, make it conditional on objective/risk signals rather than a larger blanket constant.

description: Tried stronger outside-region move penalty 3x; over-constrained merge and regressed relative score

asi.hypothesis: A stronger outside-region move penalty might further avoid basin-hostile pulls while preserving the useful 2x direction.
asi.rollback_reason: 3x over-constrained the merge: relative mean worsened, zero-regression penalty returned, and large/SGP constrained sentinels regressed versus the 2x keep.
asi.next_action_hint: Keep outside-region penalty at 2.0; do not tune it upward as a scalar.

description: Revert outside-region penalty to 1.0 under relative metric

asi.hypothesis: Under the relative metric, the original outside-region penalty may be preferable to the old kept 2.0 value because large real-world improvements now matter more.
asi.learned: Reverting outside-region penalty to 1.0 improved the primary relative metric below 1.0 with no zero-regression penalty, mainly through a much better Sailing score while preserving no-template sentinels.
asi.next_action_hint: Stop scalar-only tuning and pursue larger heuristic changes such as oracle-guided baseline fill or multi-template/risk-aware candidate choice.
